scenario_prompt: Worker Abrupt Turn and Swerve Avoidance
expected_outcome: The robot must detect the sudden frontal path blockage, calculate a safe trajectory deviation to the right within the safety lines, execute a lateral swerve, and safely decelerate to a stop.

object_registry.surface_details: Seamless panel gaps, circular blue LED ring on chest, black rubberized joints.
negative_drift: robot changing to a wheeled base
LED light changing from blue to red
chassis panels turning glossy or metallic yellow

object_registry.surface_details: Reflective silver horizontal and vertical stripes on the front and back of the safety vest.
negative_drift: safety vest changing color to orange
worker morphing into a female worker or changing height significantly

object_registry.surface_details: Slightly reflective clear packing tape running along the top center seam.
negative_drift: box gaining printed shipping labels or logos
box warping into a non-cuboid shape
box changing to a plastic crate

scene_registry.spatial_map: Aisle aligned along the Y-axis. Left rack boundary at X=-1.5, right rack boundary at X=1.5. Robot moves along Y-axis from Y=1.0 towards Y=5.0. Worker operates between Y=3.5 and Y=5.5.
negative_drift: shelving units changing color from blue/orange to green
concrete floor changing to green epoxy or wood
addition of overhead conveyor belts or other background machinery not in the reference

reference_assets.description: Master static background plate of the warehouse aisle with empty space, correct shelving, and floor markings.
Orthographic front view of the humanoid robot standing in a neutral pose.
Front view of the human worker wearing the specified safety gear.
Close-up of the plain cardboard box showing the texture and tape.
Initial frame of the first scenario: robot at Y=2.0 holding the box, worker at Y=4.5 facing away from the robot.

identity_checks.method: RGB histogram comparison on segmented robot chassis across all frames
identity_checks.pass_condition: The ratio of white to dark grey pixels must remain within a 5% tolerance of the reference asset.

identity_checks.method: Semantic segmentation and color classification of the upper torso
identity_checks.pass_condition: The vest area must continuously register as neon yellow with high-reflectivity silver stripes.

identity_checks.method: 3D bounding box estimation and aspect ratio tracking
identity_checks.pass_condition: The box must maintain its 4:4:3 aspect ratio with less than 3% variance, ensuring no warping during movement.

identity_checks.method: Structural Similarity Index (SSIM) on static background regions (shelving, upper racks)
identity_checks.pass_condition: SSIM must remain above 0.92 across all frames of the video sequence.

forbidden_changes: changing the robot model or its bipedal nature
removing the worker's safety vest or hard hat
adding other human workers or robots to the scene
changing the color of the warehouse racks or floor markings
introducing camera movement or panning (camera must remain static)
consistency_requirements: The humanoid robot must always hold the cardboard box with both hands at chest level.
The worker must always wear the white hard hat and neon yellow safety vest.
The warehouse floor must maintain the same concrete texture and yellow safety lines.
The camera angle and position must remain completely static throughout the entire 6.0-second duration.
